description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-wing layout with a mix of single and double-story sections, characterized by brown gable and hip roofs. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray or off-white color, with numerous windows of varying sizes distributed across the facade. A prominent entryway with columns and a covered porch is visible, leading to a large paved courtyard area. The backyard includes a spacious patio with a swimming pool and several lounge areas, as well as a row of tall, slender trees providing privacy. The architectural style blends traditional and modern elements, with clean lines and a balanced arrangement of volumes. The house appears to be constructed primarily from masonry and wood, with glass windows and some metal detailing.
description: A large, multi-wing house with brown gable roofs, light exterior walls, a prominent entryway, and a backyard patio with a pool and trees. The design blends traditional and modern elements with numerous windows and a spacious layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, covered porch, and the central section of the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, multiple windows, and a row of tall trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive patio, swimming pool, and outdoor lounge areas adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the backyard, pool, and the arrangement of the house wings with visible rooflines and trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered porch with columns, steps, and a central door flanked by windows
